facebook.content: "You can't lead from a place of emptiness. Marriage is not about finding a partner to complete you, but about surrendering to a Higher Partnership - where two become one flesh, not two individual identities. 'Therefore a man shall leave his father and mother and hold fast to his wife, and they shall become one flesh.' - Genesis 2:24"
facebook.fullPost:
"You can't lead from a place of emptiness. Marriage is not about finding a partner to complete you, but about surrendering to a Higher Partnership - where two become one flesh, not two individual identities. 'Therefore a man shall leave his father and mother and hold fast to his wife, and they shall become one flesh.' - Genesis 2:24"

instagram.content: Marriage is not about perfect love, but about perfect surrender. When both partners submit to God and each other, harmony follows. "Submit to one another out of reverence for Christ." Ephesians 5:21

tiktok.content: "Marriage is not about finding your soulmate, but about becoming one with Christ together. As two become one flesh, our oneness with Him is multiplied, and our marriage becomes a vibrant display of His love. - Ephesians 5:31"
